CREATE TABLE test_real_values (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value REAL);
SELECT * FROM test_real_values WHERE value BETWEEN -3.402823466E+38 AND 3.402823466E+38;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_real_values WHERE value IS NULL;
SELECT id, ROUND(value, 2) AS rounded_value FROM test_real_values WHERE value > 0;
CREATE TABLE other_values (id INT PRIMARY KEY, float_value REAL);
SELECT t1.id, t1.value, t2.float_value FROM test_real_values t1 JOIN other_values t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT id, value FROM test_real_values WHERE value < (SELECT AVG(float_value) FROM other_values);
SELECT id, value FROM test_real_values WHERE value IN (SELECT float_value FROM other_values);
UPDATE test_real_values SET value = value + 1.0 WHERE value < 2.0;
